name: Meat & Taters
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain excess fat.
2. Remove any liquid from the mushrooms and set aside.
3. Mix all ingredients with the meat in a baking dish.
4. Combine the golden mushroom soup with the reserved mushroom liquid.
5. Pour this mixture over the meat.
6. Ensure the mixture is evenly spread over the meat.
7. Cover with Tater Tots.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, covered with foil.
9. Remove foil and continue cooking until the Tater Tots are brown.
10. Onion, pepper, and mushrooms are optional.
